title: Data Compression
description: Reduction of file size via compression algorithms, rendering the file unreadable without decompression.

definitions.definition: Reduction of file size via compression algorithms, rendering the file unreadable without decompression.
definitions.notes: There is the concept for multiple file compression primarily used for archive purposes. The compression methods such as the ZIP format are used to reduce the size of a single, huge file, there is compression to compress several files into one "archive." It is convenient to store and considerably more convenient to transmit a single file than to keep track of multiple files but hinders integration of the data to tools and services, as well as performing rapid analysis.
definitions.sources:
